testcase.name: test_author_detail_worksoy_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: author posts should be summaries (no content_html) assert 'content_html' not in {'author_name': 'WorkSoy Admin', 'author_picture': None, 'author_slug': 'worksoy-admin', 'canonical_url': None, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_blog_iter10.py:163: in test_author_detail_worksoy_admin assert "content_html" not in first, "author posts should be summaries (no content_html)" E AssertionError: author posts should be summaries (no content_html) E assert 'content_html' not in {'author_name': 'WorkSoy Admin', 'author_picture': None, 'author_slug': 'worksoy-admin', 'canonical_url': None, ...}
